/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -O2 -Wall -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libsaier_rpc.so -o /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib/libsaier_rpc.so CMakeFiles/saier_rpc.dir/SeRpcApplication.cpp.o CMakeFiles/saier_rpc.dir/SeRpcChannel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/saier_rpc.dir/SeRpcController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/saier_rpc.dir/SeRpcLoadConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/saier_rpc.dir/SeRpcProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/saier_rpc.dir/ZkClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/saier_rpc.dir/rpcheader.pb.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib/libload_config.so /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib/libserv.so /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib/libthreadpool.so /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib/libtimestamp.so -lzookeeper_mt /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib/liblogger.so -lpthread
